hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams consolidate alerts, case reviews, and regulatory changes into clear workflows that preserve audit evidence and streamline internal AML reporting.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Compliance insights remain fragmented and delayed
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to track key performance indicators across onboarding, monitoring, alerts and case reviews due to disconnected tools and manual workflows. This fragmentation slows internal reporting and weakens traceability needed for audit and regulatory readiness.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates provider outputs, alert and case data, reviewer actions and internal metrics into one streamlined workflow so compliance teams can track KPIs with clear audit trails and faster reporting.
workflow_title: From alerts to compliance case reports
workflow_description: SFTY organizes alert triggers into structured cases that capture review decisions and preserve evidence for internal reporting and audit-ready workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects provider outputs into structured cases, decisions, evidence and reports to give compliance teams clear operational control and audit visibility.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with a controlled compliance layer that preserves audit evidence and streamlines provider orchestration for robust internal reporting and bank due diligence.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides compliance teams with a connected platform to structure alerts, cases, decisions, evidence and internal reports for regulated digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support internal reporting workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY consolidates data from providers into structured cases and dashboards, enabling consistent tracking of compliance KPIs across onboarding, monitoring, alerts and case escalation.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: The platform preserves detailed decision logs, case history and evidence packages to support audit readiness and defensible regulatory reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY connect existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with existing KYC, KYT, screening, Travel Rule and reporting providers without replacing them, turning their outputs into coordinated workflows.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT, or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY acts as a compliance control layer above providers, organizing their outputs into structured workflows rather than replacing underlying providers.
final_title: Structure compliance KPI reporting with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY connects alerts, case reviews and regulatory updates into audit-ready internal compliance workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
